title: Hume persona invocation: what is a pacificgooner

log.context: Hume persona invocation: what is a pacificgooner

I observe the term is composed of two parts: "Pacific" — a geographic descriptor — and "gooner," which has at least two documented usages: a supporter of Arsenal F.C. (from "Gunners"), and a more recent internet slang term from certain online subcultures.

Which meaning is intended here I cannot determine without more context. Both are observable phenomena with traceable origins. "Gooner" as Arsenal supporter is documented back decades. The internet slang usage is newer and its etymology is trac...(truncated)
